name: Draft allotment run and allotment results table
rawContent:
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- MASTER TABLES
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- Table 1: iss.iss_issuance
CREATE TABLE iss.iss_issuance (
    id BIGINT NOT NULL GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY(INCREMENT BY 1 MINVALUE 1 MAXVALUE 9223372036854775807 START 150000000000001 CACHE 1 NO CYCLE),
    uuid VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    sec_security_master_uuid VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL,
    issue_no NUMERIC(2,0),
    security_type VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
    issuance_type VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
    status VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
    auction_status VARCHAR(50),
    new_reopen_flag VARCHAR(1),
    is_benchmark VARCHAR(1),
    random_seed VARCHAR(100),
    issue_dt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
    auction_dt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
    maturity_dt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
    announcement_dt TIMESTAMP,
    bid_submission_end_dt TIMESTAMP,
    last_coupon_payment_dt TIMESTAMP,
    next_coupon_payment_dt TIMESTAMP,
    ex_int_dt TIMESTAMP,
    pricing_dt TIMESTAMP,
    public_offer_start_dt TIMESTAMP,
    public_offer_end_dt TIMESTAMP,
    app_closing_dt TIMESTAMP,
    settlement_dt TIMESTAMP,
    int_date1 TIMESTAMP,
    int_date2 TIMESTAMP,
    total_amount_offered NUMERIC(13,0) NOT NULL,
    mas_intended_tender_amount NUMERIC(13,0),
    denomination NUMERIC(10,0) NOT NULL,
    coupon_rate NUMERIC(7,4),
    accrued_int_value NUMERIC(7,4),
    accrued_int_days NUMERIC(3,0),
    tenor_value NUMERIC(3,0),
    tenor_unit VARCHAR(1) NOT NULL,
    int_paid_ind VARCHAR(1),
    meps_tenor NUMERIC(3,0),
    user_action VARCHAR(50),
    version NUMERIC(5,0) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
    is_deleted VARCHAR(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'N',
    is_migrated VARCHAR(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'N',
    created_dt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    created_by VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL,
    updated_dt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_by VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT iss_issuance_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id),
    CONSTRAINT iss_issuance_uuid_key UNIQUE (uuid)
);

-- Table 2: iss.iss_run (Process Tracking Base)
CREATE TABLE iss.iss_run (
    id BIGINT NOT NULL GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY(INCREMENT BY 1 MINVALUE 1 MAXVALUE 9223372036854775807 START 150000000000001 CACHE 1 NO CYCLE),
    uuid VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    iss_issuance_uuid VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL,
    run_no NUMERIC(2,0) NOT NULL,
    status VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
    version NUMERIC(5,0) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
    is_deleted VARCHAR(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT N,
    is_migrated VARCHAR(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT N,
    created_dt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    created_by VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL,
    updated_dt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_by VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT iss_run_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id),
    CONSTRAINT iss_run_uuid_key UNIQUE (uuid)
);

ALTER TABLE iss.iss_run ADD CONSTRAINT fk_run_issuance FOREIGN KEY (iss_issuance_uuid) REFERENCES iss.iss_issuance(uuid);
ALTER TABLE iss.iss_run ADD CONSTRAINT fk_run_issuance FOREIGN KEY (iss_issuance_uuid) REFERENCES iss.iss_issuance(uuid);

-- Table 3: iss.iss_auction_run (Parameters)
CREATE TABLE iss.iss_auction_run (
    id BIGINT NOT NULL GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY(INCREMENT BY 1 MINVALUE 1 MAXVALUE 9223372036854775807 START 150000000000001 CACHE 1 NO CYCLE),
    uuid VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    iss_run_uuid VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL,
    pre_cut_off_yield NUMERIC(10,6),
    cut_off_yield NUMERIC(10,6),
    auction_strength VARCHAR(20),
    accepted_comp_amount NUMERIC(13,0),
    accepted_noncomp_amount NUMERIC(13,0),
    allotted_comp_amount NUMERIC(13,0),
    allotted_noncomp_amount NUMERIC(13,0),
    underbid_detected VARCHAR(1) DEFAULT 'N',
    safeguard_configured VARCHAR(1) DEFAULT 'N',
    mas_noncomp_alloted_amt_a NUMERIC(13,0),
    mas_noncomp_alloted_amt_b NUMERIC(13,0),
    mas_comp_alloted_amt_c NUMERIC(13,0),
    safeguard_version NUMERIC(5,0),
    version NUMERIC(5,0) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
    is_deleted VARCHAR(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'N',
    is_migrated VARCHAR(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'N',
    created_dt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    created_by VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL,
    updated_dt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_by VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT iss_auction_run_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id),
    CONSTRAINT iss_auction_run_uuid_key UNIQUE (uuid)
);

-- Table 4: iss.iss_auction_results
CREATE TABLE iss.iss_auction_results (
    id BIGINT NOT NULL GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY(INCREMENT BY 1 MINVALUE 1 MAXVALUE 9223372036854775807 START 150000000000001 CACHE 1 NO CYCLE),
    uuid VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    iss_issuance_uuid VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL,
    iss_run_uuid VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL,
    total_amount_applied NUMERIC(13,0),
    total_amount_allotted NUMERIC(13,0),
    total_amount_applied_comp NUMERIC(13,0),
    total_amount_applied_noncomp NUMERIC(13,0),
    mas_amount_allotted NUMERIC(13,0),
    noncomp_amount_allotted NUMERIC(13,0),
    cutoff_yield NUMERIC(5,2),
    average_yield NUMERIC(5,2),
    median_yield NUMERIC(5,2),
    cutoff_price NUMERIC(7,4),
    average_price NUMERIC(7,4),
    median_price NUMERIC(7,4),
    closing_price NUMERIC(9,4),
    comp_cutoff_allotment_pct NUMERIC(4,2),
    noncomp_allotment_pct NUMERIC(5,2),
    bid_to_cover_ratio NUMERIC(6,2),
    version NUMERIC(5,0) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
    is_deleted VARCHAR(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'N',
    is_migrated VARCHAR(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'N',
    created_dt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    created_by VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL,
    updated_dt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_by VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT iss_auction_results_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id),
    CONSTRAINT iss_auction_results_uuid_key UNIQUE (uuid)
);

-- Table 5: iss.iss_sb_allotment_run (Parameters)
CREATE TABLE iss.iss_sb_allotment_run (
    id BIGINT NOT NULL GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY(INCREMENT BY 1 MINVALUE 1 MAXVALUE 9223372036854775807 START 150000000000001 CACHE 1 NO CYCLE),
    uuid VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    iss_run_uuid VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL,
    total_amount_within_limits NUMERIC(13,0),
    cutoff_amount NUMERIC(13,0),
    random_alloted_amount NUMERIC(13,0),
    random_alloted_pct NUMERIC(4,2),
    version NUMERIC(5,0) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
    is_deleted VARCHAR(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'N',
    is_migrated VARCHAR(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'N',
    created_dt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    created_by VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL,
    updated_dt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_by VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT iss_sb_allotment_run_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id),
    CONSTRAINT iss_sb_allotment_run_uuid_key UNIQUE (uuid)
);

-- Table 6: iss.iss_sb_allotment_results
CREATE TABLE iss.iss_sb_allotment_results (
    id BIGINT NOT NULL GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY(INCREMENT BY 1 MINVALUE 1 MAXVALUE 9223372036854775807 START 150000000000001 CACHE 1 NO CYCLE),
    uuid VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    iss_issuance_uuid VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL,
    iss_run_uuid VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL,
    total_amount_applied NUMERIC(13,0),
    total_amount_allotted NUMERIC(13,0),
    total_amount_rejected NUMERIC(13,0),
    cutoff_amount NUMERIC(13,0),
    random_alloted_amount NUMERIC(13,0),
    random_alloted_rate NUMERIC(4,2),
    version NUMERIC(5,0) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
    is_deleted VARCHAR(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'N',
    is_migrated VARCHAR(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'N',
    created_dt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    created_by VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL,
    updated_dt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_by VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT iss_sb_allotment_results_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id),
    CONSTRAINT iss_sb_allotment_results_uuid_key UNIQUE (uuid)
);

-- Table 7: iss.iss_synd_allotment_run (Parameters)
CREATE TABLE iss.iss_synd_allotment_run (
    id BIGINT NOT NULL GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY(INCREMENT BY 1 MINVALUE 1 MAXVALUE 9223372036854775807 START 150000000000001 CACHE 1 NO CYCLE),
    uuid VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    iss_run_uuid VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL,
    public_offer_amount_offered NUMERIC(13,0),
    public_offer_amount_applied NUMERIC(13,0),
    public_offer_amount_allotted NUMERIC(13,0),
    public_offer_subscription_rate NUMERIC(5,2),
    placement_amount_allotted NUMERIC(13,0),
    placement_subscription_rate NUMERIC(5,2),
    amount_to_be_reallotted NUMERIC(13,0),
    version NUMERIC(5,0) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
    is_deleted VARCHAR(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'N',
    is_migrated VARCHAR(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'N',
    created_dt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    created_by VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL,
    updated_dt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_by VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT iss_synd_allotment_run_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id),
    CONSTRAINT iss_synd_allotment_run_uuid_key UNIQUE (uuid)
);

-- Table 8: iss.iss_synd_allotment_results
CREATE TABLE iss.iss_synd_allotment_results (
    id BIGINT NOT NULL GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY(INCREMENT BY 1 MINVALUE 1 MAXVALUE 9223372036854775807 START 150000000000001 CACHE 1 NO CYCLE),
    uuid VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    iss_issuance_uuid VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL,
    iss_run_uuid VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL,
    public_offer_amount_offered NUMERIC(13,0),
    public_offer_amount_applied NUMERIC(13,0),
    public_offer_amount_allotted NUMERIC(13,0),
    public_offer_subscription_rate NUMERIC(5,2),
    placement_amount_allotted NUMERIC(13,0),
    placement_subscription_rate NUMERIC(5,2),
    amount_to_be_reallotted NUMERIC(13,0),
    version NUMERIC(5,0) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
    is_deleted VARCHAR(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'N',
    is_migrated VARCHAR(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'N',
    created_dt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    created_by VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL,
    updated_dt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_by VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT iss_synd_allotment_results_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id),
    CONSTRAINT iss_synd_allotment_results_uuid_key UNIQUE (uuid)
);

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- FOREIGN KEY CONSTRAINTS (MASTER)
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

ALTER TABLE iss.iss_issuance ADD CONSTRAINT fk_issuance_secmaster FOREIGN KEY (sec_security_master_uuid) REFERENCES sec.sec_security_master(uuid);
ALTER TABLE iss.iss_auction_run ADD CONSTRAINT fk_auction_run_base FOREIGN KEY (iss_run_uuid) REFERENCES iss.iss_run(uuid);
ALTER TABLE iss.iss_auction_results 
    ADD CONSTRAINT fk_auction_res_issuance FOREIGN KEY (iss_issuance_uuid) REFERENCES iss.iss_issuance(uuid),
    ADD CONSTRAINT fk_auction_res_run FOREIGN KEY (iss_run_uuid) REFERENCES iss.iss_run(uuid);

ALTER TABLE iss.iss_sb_allotment_run ADD CONSTRAINT fk_sb_allotment_run_base FOREIGN KEY (iss_run_uuid) REFERENCES iss.iss_run(uuid);
ALTER TABLE iss.iss_sb_allotment_results 
    ADD CONSTRAINT fk_sb_allotment_res_issuance FOREIGN KEY (iss_issuance_uuid) REFERENCES iss.iss_issuance(uuid),
    ADD CONSTRAINT fk_sb_allotment_res_run FOREIGN KEY (iss_run_uuid) REFERENCES iss.iss_run(uuid);

ALTER TABLE iss.iss_synd_allotment_run ADD CONSTRAINT fk_synd_allotment_run_base FOREIGN KEY (iss_run_uuid) REFERENCES iss.iss_run(uuid);
ALTER TABLE iss.iss_synd_allotment_results 
    ADD CONSTRAINT fk_synd_allotment_res_issuance FOREIGN KEY (iss_issuance_uuid) REFERENCES iss.iss_issuance(uuid),
    ADD CONSTRAINT fk_synd_allotment_res_run FOREIGN KEY (iss_run_uuid) REFERENCES iss.iss_run(uuid);

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- TRANSACTION TABLES (_t)
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- Table 1: iss.iss_issuance_t
CREATE TABLE iss.iss_issuance_t (
    trans_id bigint NOT NULL GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY(INCREMENT BY 1 MINVALUE 1 MAXVALUE 9223372036854775807 START 150000000000001 CACHE 1 NO CYCLE),
    trans_uuid varchar(36) NOT NULL DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    id bigint NOT NULL,
    uuid varchar(36) NOT NULL,
    sec_security_master_uuid varchar(36) NOT NULL,
    issue_no numeric(2,0),
    security_type varchar(50),
    issuance_type varchar(50),
    status varchar(50),
    auction_status varchar(50),
    new_reopen_flag varchar(1),
    is_benchmark varchar(1),
    random_seed varchar(100),
    issue_dt timestamp,
    auction_dt timestamp,
    maturity_dt timestamp,
    announcement_dt timestamp,
    bid_submission_end_dt timestamp,
    last_coupon_payment_dt timestamp,
    next_coupon_payment_dt timestamp,
    ex_int_dt timestamp,
    pricing_dt timestamp,
    public_offer_start_dt timestamp,
    public_offer_end_dt timestamp,
    app_closing_dt timestamp,
    settlement_dt timestamp,
    int_date1 timestamp,
    int_date2 timestamp,
    total_amount_offered numeric(13,0),
    mas_intended_tender_amount numeric(13,0),
    denomination numeric(10,0),
    coupon_rate numeric(7,4),
    accrued_interest_value numeric(7,4),
    accrued_interest_days numeric(3,0),
    tenor_value numeric(3,0),
    tenor_unit varchar(1),
    int_paid_ind varchar(1),
    meps_tenor numeric(3,0),
    user_action varchar(50),
    version numeric(5,0) NOT NULL,
    is_deleted varchar(1) NOT NULL,
    is_migrated varchar(1) NOT NULL,
    created_dt timestamp NOT NULL,
    created_by varchar(36) NOT NULL,
    updated_dt timestamp,
    updated_by varchar(36) NOT NULL,
    audit_action varchar(1) NOT NULL,
    audit_timestamp timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    is_history varchar(1) DEFAULT 'Y',
    CONSTRAINT iss_issuance_t_pkey PRIMARY KEY (trans_id),
    CONSTRAINT iss_issuance_t_trans_uuid_key UNIQUE (trans_uuid)
);

-- Table 2: iss.iss_run_t
CREATE TABLE iss.iss_run_t (
    trans_id bigint NOT NULL GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY(INCREMENT BY 1 MINVALUE 1 MAXVALUE 9223372036854775807 START 150000000000001 CACHE 1 NO CYCLE),
    trans_uuid varchar(36) NOT NULL DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    id bigint NOT NULL,
    uuid varchar(36) NOT NULL,
    iss_issuance_uuid varchar(36) NOT NULL,
    run_no int NOT NULL,
    status varchar(50) NOT NULL,
    version numeric(5,0) NOT NULL,
    is_deleted varchar(1) NOT NULL,
    is_migrated varchar(1) NOT NULL,
    created_dt timestamp NOT NULL,
    created_by varchar(36) NOT NULL,
    updated_dt timestamp,
    updated_by varchar(36) NOT NULL,
    audit_action varchar(1) NOT NULL,
    audit_timestamp timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    is_history varchar(1) DEFAULT 'Y',
    CONSTRAINT iss_run_t_pkey PRIMARY KEY (trans_id),
    CONSTRAINT iss_run_t_trans_uuid_key UNIQUE (trans_uuid)
);

-- Table 3: iss.iss_auction_run_t
CREATE TABLE iss.iss_auction_run_t (
    trans_id bigint NOT NULL GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY(INCREMENT BY 1 MINVALUE 1 MAXVALUE 9223372036854775807 START 150000000000001 CACHE 1 NO CYCLE),
    trans_uuid varchar(36) NOT NULL DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    id bigint NOT NULL,
    uuid varchar(36) NOT NULL,
    iss_run_uuid varchar(36) NOT NULL,
    pre_cut_off_yield numeric(10,6),
    cut_off_yield numeric(10,6),
    auction_strength varchar(20),
    accepted_comp_amount numeric(13,0),
    accepted_noncomp_amount numeric(13,0),
    allotted_comp_amount numeric(13,0),
    allotted_noncomp_amount numeric(13,0),
    underbid_detected varchar(1),
    safeguard_configured varchar(1),
    mas_noncomp_alloted_amt_a numeric(13,0),
    mas_noncomp_alloted_amt_b numeric(13,0),
    mas_comp_alloted_amt_c numeric(13,0),
    safeguard_version numeric(5,0),
    version numeric(5,0) NOT NULL,
    is_deleted varchar(1) NOT NULL,
    is_migrated varchar(1) NOT NULL,
    created_dt timestamp NOT NULL,
    created_by varchar(36) NOT NULL,
    updated_dt timestamp,
    updated_by varchar(36) NOT NULL,
    audit_action varchar(1) NOT NULL,
    audit_timestamp timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    is_history varchar(1) DEFAULT 'Y',
    CONSTRAINT iss_auction_run_t_pkey PRIMARY KEY (trans_id),
    CONSTRAINT iss_auction_run_t_trans_uuid_key UNIQUE (trans_uuid)
);

-- Table 4: iss.iss_auction_results_t
CREATE TABLE iss.iss_auction_results_t (
    trans_id bigint NOT NULL GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY(INCREMENT BY 1 MINVALUE 1 MAXVALUE 9223372036854775807 START 150000000000001 CACHE 1 NO CYCLE),
    trans_uuid varchar(36) NOT NULL DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    id bigint NOT NULL,
    uuid varchar(36) NOT NULL,
    iss_issuance_uuid varchar(36) NOT NULL,
    iss_run_uuid varchar(36) NOT NULL,
    total_amount_applied numeric(13,0),
    total_amount_allotted numeric(13,0),
    total_amount_applied_comp numeric(13,0),
    total_amount_applied_noncomp numeric(13,0),
    mas_amount_allotted numeric(13,0),
    noncomp_amount_allotted numeric(13,0),
    cutoff_yield numeric(5,2),
    average_yield numeric(5,2),
    median_yield numeric(5,2),
    cutoff_price numeric(7,4),
    average_price numeric(7,4),
    median_price numeric(7,4),
    closing_price numeric(9,4),
    comp_cutoff_allotment_pct numeric(4,2),
    noncomp_allotment_pct numeric(5,2),
    bid_to_cover_ratio numeric(6,2),
    version numeric(5,0) NOT NULL,
    is_deleted varchar(1) NOT NULL,
    is_migrated varchar(1) NOT NULL,
    created_dt timestamp NOT NULL,
    created_by varchar(36) NOT NULL,
    updated_dt timestamp,
    updated_by varchar(36) NOT NULL,
    audit_action varchar(1) NOT NULL,
    audit_timestamp timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    is_history varchar(1) DEFAULT 'Y',
    CONSTRAINT iss_auction_results_t_pkey PRIMARY KEY (trans_id),
    CONSTRAINT iss_auction_results_t_trans_uuid_key UNIQUE (trans_uuid)
);

-- Table 5: iss.iss_sb_allotment_run_t
CREATE TABLE iss.iss_sb_allotment_run_t (
    trans_id bigint NOT NULL GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY(INCREMENT BY 1 MINVALUE 1 MAXVALUE 9223372036854775807 START 150000000000001 CACHE 1 NO CYCLE),
    trans_uuid varchar(36) NOT NULL DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    id bigint NOT NULL,
    uuid varchar(36) NOT NULL,
    iss_run_uuid varchar(36) NOT NULL,
    total_amount_within_limits numeric(13,0),
    cutoff_amount numeric(13,0),
    random_alloted_amount numeric(13,0),
    random_alloted_rate numeric(4,2),
    version numeric(5,0) NOT NULL,
    is_deleted varchar(1) NOT NULL,
    is_migrated varchar(1) NOT NULL,
    created_dt timestamp NOT NULL,
    created_by varchar(36) NOT NULL,
    updated_dt timestamp,
    updated_by varchar(36) NOT NULL,
    audit_action varchar(1) NOT NULL,
    audit_timestamp timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    is_history varchar(1) DEFAULT 'Y',
    CONSTRAINT iss_sb_allotment_run_t_pkey PRIMARY KEY (trans_id),
    CONSTRAINT iss_sb_allotment_run_t_trans_uuid_key UNIQUE (trans_uuid)
);

-- Table 6: iss.iss_sb_allotment_results_t
CREATE TABLE iss.iss_sb_allotment_results_t (
    trans_id bigint NOT NULL GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY(INCREMENT BY 1 MINVALUE 1 MAXVALUE 9223372036854775807 START 150000000000001 CACHE 1 NO CYCLE),
    trans_uuid varchar(36) NOT NULL DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    id bigint NOT NULL,
    uuid varchar(36) NOT NULL,
    iss_issuance_uuid varchar(36) NOT NULL,
    iss_run_uuid varchar(36) NOT NULL,
    total_amount_applied numeric(13,0),
    total_amount_allotted numeric(13,0),
    total_amount_rejected numeric(13,0),
    cutoff_amount numeric(13,0),
    random_alloted_amount numeric(13,0),
    random_alloted_rate numeric(4,2),
    version numeric(5,0) NOT NULL,
    is_deleted varchar(1) NOT NULL,
    is_migrated varchar(1) NOT NULL,
    created_dt timestamp NOT NULL,
    created_by varchar(36) NOT NULL,
    updated_dt timestamp,
    updated_by varchar(36) NOT NULL,
    audit_action varchar(1) NOT NULL,
    audit_timestamp timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    is_history varchar(1) DEFAULT 'Y',
    CONSTRAINT iss_sb_allotment_results_t_pkey PRIMARY KEY (trans_id),
    CONSTRAINT iss_sb_allotment_results_t_trans_uuid_key UNIQUE (trans_uuid)
);

-- Table 7: iss.iss_synd_allotment_run_t
CREATE TABLE iss.iss_synd_allotment_run_t (
    trans_id bigint NOT NULL GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY(INCREMENT BY 1 MINVALUE 1 MAXVALUE 9223372036854775807 START 150000000000001 CACHE 1 NO CYCLE),
    trans_uuid varchar(36) NOT NULL DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    id bigint NOT NULL,
    uuid varchar(36) NOT NULL,
    iss_run_uuid varchar(36) NOT NULL,
    public_offer_amount_offered numeric(13,0),
    public_offer_amount_applied numeric(13,0),
    public_offer_amount_allotted numeric(13,0),
    public_offer_subscription_rate numeric(5,2),
    placement_amount_allotted numeric(13,0),
    placement_subscription_rate numeric(5,2),
    amount_to_be_reallotted numeric(13,0),
    version numeric(5,0) NOT NULL,
    is_deleted varchar(1) NOT NULL,
    is_migrated varchar(1) NOT NULL,
    created_dt timestamp NOT NULL,
    created_by varchar(36) NOT NULL,
    updated_dt timestamp,
    updated_by varchar(36) NOT NULL,
    audit_action varchar(1) NOT NULL,
    audit_timestamp timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    is_history varchar(1) DEFAULT 'Y',
    CONSTRAINT iss_synd_allotment_run_t_pkey PRIMARY KEY (trans_id),
    CONSTRAINT iss_synd_allotment_run_t_trans_uuid_key UNIQUE (trans_uuid)
);

-- Table 8: iss.iss_synd_allotment_results_t
CREATE TABLE iss.iss_synd_allotment_results_t (
    trans_id bigint NOT NULL GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY(INCREMENT BY 1 MINVALUE 1 MAXVALUE 9223372036854775807 START 150000000000001 CACHE 1 NO CYCLE),
    trans_uuid varchar(36) NOT NULL DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    id bigint NOT NULL,
    uuid varchar(36) NOT NULL,
    iss_issuance_uuid varchar(36) NOT NULL,
    iss_run_uuid varchar(36) NOT NULL,
    public_offer_amount_offered numeric(13,0),
    public_offer_amount_applied numeric(13,0),
    public_offer_amount_allotted numeric(13,0),
    public_offer_subscription_rate numeric(5,2),
    placement_amount_allotted numeric(13,0),
    placement_subscription_rate numeric(5,2),
    amount_to_be_reallotted numeric(13,0),
    version numeric(5,0) NOT NULL,
    is_deleted varchar(1) NOT NULL,
    is_migrated varchar(1) NOT NULL,
    created_dt timestamp NOT NULL,
    created_by varchar(36) NOT NULL,
    updated_dt timestamp,
    updated_by varchar(36) NOT NULL,
    audit_action varchar(1) NOT NULL,
    audit_timestamp timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    is_history varchar(1) DEFAULT 'Y',
    CONSTRAINT iss_synd_allotment_results_t_pkey PRIMARY KEY (trans_id),
    CONSTRAINT iss_synd_allotment_results_t_trans_uuid_key UNIQUE (trans_uuid)
);

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- FOREIGN KEY LINKAGES FOR TRANSACTION TABLES (_t)
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- Primary Master Linkages
-- Link Issuance to Security Master
-- Security & Issuance Hierarchy
ALTER TABLE iss.iss_issuance 
    ADD CONSTRAINT fk_issuance_secmaster FOREIGN KEY (sec_security_master_uuid) REFERENCES sec.sec_security_master(uuid);

ALTER TABLE iss.iss_run 
    ADD CONSTRAINT fk_run_issuance FOREIGN KEY (iss_issuance_uuid) REFERENCES iss.iss_issuance(uuid);

-- Auction (SGS/T-Bills) Constraints
ALTER TABLE iss.iss_auction_run 
    ADD CONSTRAINT fk_auction_run_base FOREIGN KEY (iss_run_uuid) REFERENCES iss.iss_run(uuid);

ALTER TABLE iss.iss_auction_results 
    ADD CONSTRAINT fk_auction_res_issuance FOREIGN KEY (iss_issuance_uuid) REFERENCES iss.iss_issuance(uuid);

ALTER TABLE iss.iss_auction_results 
    ADD CONSTRAINT fk_auction_res_run FOREIGN KEY (iss_run_uuid) REFERENCES iss.iss_run(uuid);

-- SB Allotment Constraints
ALTER TABLE iss.iss_sb_allotment_run 
    ADD CONSTRAINT fk_sb_allotment_run_base FOREIGN KEY (iss_run_uuid) REFERENCES iss.iss_run(uuid);

ALTER TABLE iss.iss_sb_allotment_results 
    ADD CONSTRAINT fk_sb_allotment_res_issuance FOREIGN KEY (iss_issuance_uuid) REFERENCES iss.iss_issuance(uuid);

ALTER TABLE iss.iss_sb_allotment_results 
    ADD CONSTRAINT fk_sb_allotment_res_run FOREIGN KEY (iss_run_uuid) REFERENCES iss.iss_run(uuid);

-- Syndication Allotment Constraints
ALTER TABLE iss.iss_synd_allotment_run 
    ADD CONSTRAINT fk_synd_allotment_run_base FOREIGN KEY (iss_run_uuid) REFERENCES iss.iss_run(uuid);

ALTER TABLE iss.iss_synd_allotment_results 
    ADD CONSTRAINT fk_synd_allotment_res_issuance FOREIGN KEY (iss_issuance_uuid) REFERENCES iss.iss_issuance(uuid);

ALTER TABLE iss.iss_synd_allotment_results 
    ADD CONSTRAINT fk_synd_allotment_res_run FOREIGN KEY (iss_run_uuid) REFERENCES iss.iss_run(uuid);
    
  -- Transaction to Master UUID Linkages
ALTER TABLE iss.iss_issuance_t 
    ADD CONSTRAINT fk_iss_issuance_t_master FOREIGN KEY (uuid) REFERENCES iss.iss_issuance(uuid);

ALTER TABLE iss.iss_run_t 
    ADD CONSTRAINT fk_iss_run_t_master FOREIGN KEY (uuid) REFERENCES iss.iss_run(uuid);

ALTER TABLE iss.iss_auction_run_t 
    ADD CONSTRAINT fk_iss_auction_run_t_master FOREIGN KEY (uuid) REFERENCES iss.iss_auction_run(uuid);

ALTER TABLE iss.iss_auction_results_t 
    ADD CONSTRAINT fk_iss_auction_results_t_master FOREIGN KEY (uuid) REFERENCES iss.iss_auction_results(uuid);

ALTER TABLE iss.iss_sb_allotment_run_t 
    ADD CONSTRAINT fk_iss_sb_allotment_run_t_master FOREIGN KEY (uuid) REFERENCES iss.iss_sb_allotment_run(uuid);

ALTER TABLE iss.iss_sb_allotment_results_t 
    ADD CONSTRAINT fk_iss_sb_allotment_results_t_master FOREIGN KEY (uuid) REFERENCES iss.iss_sb_allotment_results(uuid);

ALTER TABLE iss.iss_synd_allotment_run_t 
    ADD CONSTRAINT fk_iss_synd_allotment_run_t_master FOREIGN KEY (uuid) REFERENCES iss.iss_synd_allotment_run(uuid);

ALTER TABLE iss.iss_synd_allotment_results_t 
    ADD CONSTRAINT fk_iss_synd_allotment_results_t_master FOREIGN KEY (uuid) REFERENCES iss.iss_synd_allotment_results(uuid);

-- Transaction to Run Process Linkages
ALTER TABLE iss.iss_auction_run_t 
    ADD CONSTRAINT fk_iss_auction_run_t_run FOREIGN KEY (iss_run_uuid) REFERENCES iss.iss_run(uuid);

ALTER TABLE iss.iss_auction_results_t 
    ADD CONSTRAINT fk_iss_auction_res_t_run FOREIGN KEY (iss_run_uuid) REFERENCES iss.iss_run(uuid);

ALTER TABLE iss.iss_sb_allotment_run_t 
    ADD CONSTRAINT fk_iss_sb_allotment_run_t_run FOREIGN KEY (iss_run_uuid) REFERENCES iss.iss_run(uuid);

ALTER TABLE iss.iss_sb_allotment_results_t 
    ADD CONSTRAINT fk_iss_sb_allotment_res_t_run FOREIGN KEY (iss_run_uuid) REFERENCES iss.iss_run(uuid);

ALTER TABLE iss.iss_synd_allotment_run_t 
    ADD CONSTRAINT fk_iss_synd_allotment_run_t_run FOREIGN KEY (iss_run_uuid) REFERENCES iss.iss_run(uuid);

ALTER TABLE iss.iss_synd_allotment_results_t 
    ADD CONSTRAINT fk_iss_synd_allotment_res_t_run FOREIGN KEY (iss_run_uuid) REFERENCES iss.iss_run(uuid);
